name: Orange Chocolate Chunk Cookies
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Semisweet chocolate bar, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 300°F. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, salt, and orange peel. Mix well with a wire whisk and set aside. In a large bowl, blend sugars with an electric mixer at medium speed. Add butter and beat to form a grainy paste, scraping sides of the bowl if needed. Add eggs and orange extract, and beat at medium speed until light and fluffy. Gradually add the flour mixture and chopped chocolate, blending at low speed just until combined. Do not overmix. Drop rounded tablespoons onto an ungreased cookie sheet, 1-1/2 inches apart. Bake for 22-24 minutes until cookies are lightly browned along edges. Transfer cookies immediately to a cool surface with a spatula. Makes 3 dozen.
